description_long: This is a rectangular juice carton labeled 'FARAGELLO GOLD' and 'PREMIUM COCKTAIL NECTAR FROM MANY FRUITS', featuring a vibrant image of assorted fruits including pineapple, apple, banana, and blueberries on the front. The carton is predominantly white with gold accents and text, giving it a premium appearance. One side displays a barcode, recycling information, and additional product details, while another side is dominated by the brand name 'FARAGELLO' in large gold letters. The back of the carton contains detailed product information in multiple languages, as well as a visible nutritional information panel. The top of the carton is sealed and does not show a traditional cap, suggesting a tear or fold-to-open closure. The overall design is sleek and modern, suitable for display in urban retail or convenience settings.
description: A white and gold rectangular juice carton labeled 'FARAGELLO GOLD' with images of assorted fruits and detailed product information on its sides. The packaging is sleek, premium, and features a sealed top without a visible cap.
description_view_0: This view shows the side of the carton with a barcode, recycling logo, and part of the nutritional information panel.
description_view_1: The front view displays the 'FARAGELLO GOLD' branding and a colorful assortment of fruit illustrations, with product volume and description.
description_view_2: This side highlights the large vertical 'FARAGELLO' brand name in gold and a smaller 'PREMIUM COCKTAIL NECTAR' label at the bottom.
description_view_3: The back view is filled with detailed product and nutritional information in multiple languages, along with a small fruit illustration at the bottom.
